name: Playback Indicator
description: Shows direct play / transcode status badges on episode and movie rows, auto-detected from your current device. ALPHA — NOT PRODUCTION READY.
overview: Shows direct play / transcode status badges on episode and movie rows in the Jellyfin web UI, auto-detected from your current device.

versions.changelog: Fix JS injection: now loads globally on all Jellyfin pages via index.html modification, served from plugin controller endpoint
Device-specific cache keys fix cross-device wrong status, badge text alignment fix
Use Jellyfin built-in PlaybackInfo API for universal DirectPlay/Stream/Transcode detection, fix movie detail badge
